text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's almost time for training.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'll just organize these files first.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Excellent, that's done with. Now, what's left?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, of course. I need to skim the documents for
tomorrow's meeting.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I might as well give them a thorough read while
I've got them...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... These points could definitely be expressed
more clearly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should go over these again and trim
them down a little...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No, I can't just leave them like this. I should fix
this passage, at the very least!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time Symboli Rudolf fixes up the
documents to her satisfaction, training time has
already come and gone...
